data.description:
Apply four xcodebuild improvements to scripts/reloads.sh (staging build script) on M-series Macs:

1. Skip x86_64 by default. Add ARCHS=arm64 ONLY_ACTIVE_ARCH=YES; --universal opt-out flag. Production release.yml stays universal.

2. Stable derived-data path per branch family. release/* tags share /tmp/c11-staging-release/; c11-* share /tmp/c11-staging-c11/; default fallback otherwise. Add HEAD sanity check + --clean flag (current per-tag dir behavior = always clean).

3. (Item 3 from spec was deliberately dropped — operator chose to skip package/macro validation flags.)

4. COMPILER_INDEX_STORE_ENABLE=NO for staging.

5. SWIFT_COMPILATION_MODE=incremental for staging; --wmo (or --release-mode) opt-out for the rare staging build that needs full WMO parity (e.g. last build before tag push, to catch WMO-only regressions like 0.47.0 New Workspace dialog).

Acceptance criteria:
- No-flag build: arm64-only, incremental, no index store, shared derived-data dir.
- --universal: universal binary still produced.
- --clean: wipes derived-data dir before build.
- --wmo: switches to wholemodule.
- Resulting c11 STAGING app launches and basics (window, sidebar, terminal pane) work.
- release.yml + nightly.yml untouched.

Expected headline: cold staging build ~6-10min → ~3-5min; warm rebuild ~6min → <60s.
data.title: Staging build perf: arm64-only, shared derived-data, no index store, incremental swift

data.body:
PR opened: https://github.com/Stage-11-Agentics/c11/pull/189

6 commits on c11-110/staging-build-perf against main.

Wall-clock on M4 Max:
- First-ever cold build (empty derived-data dir): 6m 3s
- Warm rebuild (no source changes, same tag): 15s
- Cold-after-clean (--clean; global caches retained): 2m 45s

--universal and --wmo verified via dry-run mocking xcodebuild; full builds skipped to avoid foreground/focus churn while operator was hand-testing v0.49.0 staging. Echoed xcodebuild invocation makes those modes re-verifiable in one log line.

Shipped scripts/reloads.sh changes for items 1, 2, 4, 5 from the v0.49.0 staging chat. Item 3 (skipPackagePluginValidation + skipMacroValidation) was deliberately dropped per operator.

Changes (one commit per item):
- Item 4: COMPILER_INDEX_STORE_ENABLE=NO unconditionally.
- Item 5: SWIFT_COMPILATION_MODE=incremental by default; --wmo opt-out for prod parity.
- Item 1: ARCHS=arm64 ONLY_ACTIVE_ARCH=YES by default; --universal opt-out.
- Item 2: derived-data path keys on tag family (prefix-up-to-first-hyphen); --clean flag; .last-sha/.last-tag breadcrumb files printed on reuse.
- Plus: echo xcodebuild invocation before running it (useful diagnostic).

Wall-clock validated on M4 Max: cold 6m3s, warm 15s, cold-after-clean 2m45s. --universal/--wmo verified via mocked-xcodebuild dry-run (full builds skipped to avoid foreground churn while operator's v0.49.0 staging was being hand-tested).

PR: https://github.com/Stage-11-Agentics/c11/pull/189 (against main).

CI release.yml and nightly.yml untouched.

Follow-up not in this PR: same wins could be lifted to scripts/reload.sh (Debug script).
